creator: madpilot@FreeBSD.org
text:
Not sure how to deal with this now.

I have seen no negative effect from running with this patch.

Only report I have is in comment #72 and indicates this patch is not fixing the actual issue.

to Jethro Nederhof:

Could you try again?

I also uploaded the patched port directory here:

https://people.freebsd.org/~madpilot/libxfce4menu.txz

you could simply remove the previous port and unpack this in x11 to get an already patched one.

This would remove doubt about incorrect patching.

Please note that this patch does include again the xfce_shortcuts_grabber_ungrab_all call, but in a conditional, it should work though, as far as I know.
